description: Nadine Gisdon and Daniel Killenberger from Obligate present Margarita Finance, a platform enabling users to customize their investment risk and yield directly on Solana. They discuss the complexities of traditional finance structured products and how Margarita Finance aims to simplify access to similar opportunities in DeFi.
topic_summary: Introduction to Margarita Finance by Obligate, focusing on customizable investment options in DeFi, contrasting with traditional finance complexities [t=10:24 - t=39:05].
